cases.notes: Unknown namespaced fields on open core entities must not break clients that only implement the frozen core session shape.
Unknown namespaced extension events are safely ignorable unless a client explicitly opts into fail-closed behavior.
Namespaced capability flags add discovery detail but do not replace the core capability booleans.
Closed core method params must not be widened in place; a new namespaced method carries the extension-specific request shape.
New event meaning must use a namespaced event instead of adding extra fields to a closed core event payload.
